titleStmt.title: SII 29.119: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 119. (A.R. No. B. 527 of 1961-62.) SYED-CHINCHŌḶI GULBARGA TALUK, GULBARGA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup infront of the Hanumān temple.

This record is engraved in continuation of No. 77 above. It belongs to the reign period of Kalachūri Rayamurāri Bhujabalamalladēva. It states that mahāpradhāna Mādhavaiah after appealing to the emperor, made a gift of land in Bāḍa-uppaḷa-vāvi situated in Goṁka-nūrippattaru-vattu [120+60=180], which was under the jurīsdiction of his administration, to the worship and offerings and for various services and maintenance of the temple of the god Nāraṇēśvara of Cheṁchavaḷḷi and also for the feeding of the ascetics and for maintaining a choultry there in.

Chaṅḍimarasa, who was them administering Cheṁchavaḷḷi made over the gift to Vāraṇāsi Sṛishṭikāchārya Tējōnīdhi paṅḍitadeva. Details of land so gifted is mentioned in the record. The responsibility of maintaining and protecting the gift was made to vest on the prabhus and gāvuṇḍas (of the place).

The record is dated in the 7th regnal year (of the king), Vijaya [Śaka year not mentioned], Jyēshṭha, amāvāsya, Monday, solar eclipse, Pushya nakshatra and Vishu saṁkramaṇa. It probably corresponds to 1173 A.D., June 12 (Tuesday). There was no saṁkramaṇa on that day but the solar eclipse occured. The eclipse occurred on Tuesday. But the nakshatra was Ardrā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Though this record is engraved in continuations of No. 273 above, the lines are
div.p:
śrīmaccaḷukikuḷa samādhavana kaḷacūryyana kuḷabhōraṇa bijjabhūpa prathōdāna jarbbāja thāḷi(ṣṭāḷaṁ)sidā niṁda . Ā traṁ bhuvabhāgya(daṁndu)
ṁ ripuśrapācarēsvara vi ta (mrigē)ṁdraṁ negaḻveṁ bhūtaḷadoḷu ḷatri siṁha(rasara)voḷa guṇi mādirāja daṁḍādhīśvaraṁ
mudadiṁda vaṁdā ḍaṁ paduḷa Ara bhi(kṣu) pāryyanaṁtarūkṣakke (sati) śrī magakṣa ṁśu mādhava maṁtri śrīkāṁta yenisija ṁ
dāvi sthirātma guṇi tāḷdirddaḷu . (mo)dhareyaṁ śrī (rāsā)nāḷvaṁ tire ṁ rēcasiṁhaṁ (ra) māgalu (va) dēvaṁ sakaḷā ripu brigēṁdra nāgāṁka
gra dramma(kaṁ) svāmige vinaya paraṁ beṁ daradādināthaṁdārāgara yiṁ vīsadaraṇiyaṁ biṭṭa (rācūrra tāra) . paḷadi prātāṁta kīrtti pra . taredā
nūddāragaṁkāramūrtti si(ḷi)tārāti pratāpaṁkṣitipati(kuḷa) ṁdakāra duṣṭakṣiti na tavātaṁniḷa sadviḷvāvinitaṁ negaḻdana
paraṁ caṁdra daṁḍādhinātha . vārijanābha ni(r)ddāmritavājja tējōśva(śū)rddhagaṁ (ri)ṁ cāḷu bāvinarddaśaṁ (pradhā)nanidda ṁgade bhāda nōśvala(kṣmī) nelasidda
rā guṇāvāradaṁtā vistārētakīrtti caṁdranripa nirdudēsipudāni taḷāgradoḷu . śrīsvasti śrīmatu kaḷacūryya cakravarti rāyamurāri bhujabaḷa malladēva varṣa
da 7 neya vijaya saṁvatsarada jēṣṭhadamāvāse sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇa vyatīpāta puśya nakṣatra viśusaṁkramaṇa(daṁdu) ceṁcavaḷḷiya śrīnāraṇēśvara dē
vara pūje nivēdyakaṁ bhṛtadhōtrakaṁ dēvakaṁgabhōga raṁgabhōgakaṁ tapōdhanarā (pātra)dānakaṁ satrakaṁ (pu)rāṇa khaṇḍikakaṁ khaṁḍaspuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakaṁ yiṁdō śrī manma
hāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati bāhattara niyōgādhipati hiriyadaṁḍanāyakaṁ mādavayyaṁgaḷu taṁmāḷkeya goṁkanūṟippattaṟuvattaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ Uppaḷavāvi (ya)
mēlāḷiya cakravarttige biṁnnapaṁgeydu dēvange sarvanamasyavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru . śrī mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvarara kāḷadēvarasa(ruṁ) śrīman mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīra
goṁkedēvarasaruṁ Uppaḷa vāviya taṁma (maṁneya) sarbba namasyavāgi dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi vriti hāḷada ciṁcavaḷḷiya
prabhu caṁdimarasayyaṁgaḷu Uppaḷavāviya śūlasāmi ḷake yallā prabhu dhārā pūrbba
māḍi koṭṭaraṁtu tribhōgā bhṛṁdarāgahitaḷa dēvarige jjanarāśyavāgi dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru
yaśō guṇanidhi tatpāmrita nidhiya(ṇa)trame sanu ṁ(dra) tējōnidhigaḷu . svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyānadhāraṇa maunānuṣṭāna japasamādhiśīḷa guṇasaṁpaṁnarappā śrī vā
raṇāsiya sṛṣṭikācāryya tējōnidhi paṁḍitadēvara padakamaḷaṁgaḷaṁ nā(ḍi) sōvare ceṁcavaḷḷiya prabhu caṁḍimarasayaṁgaḷu (taṁma) kara ceṁcavaḷḷiya sthaḷa(vri)
ttiyumaṁ Uppaḷavāviya caturāpū sa(bā)ta tribhōgābhyaṁtara kara sarvvanamaśyavāgi dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru . Uppaḷavāviya yeṁtene Ā mā mū
ḍalu tāvaregeṟeyiṁ paḍuva mūḍaṇa naṁdavāṭada pūrbataṭaṁ pramāṇa teṁkaliṁ (pra)māṇu
ṁ paḍuvaluttara mukhavāda mālegārttiya holadiṁ baḍagalu
galu (kaṁge) mageya ṁ mālagārttigaṁ me māḍadā pūjāṁ pramāṇe ya kaṁtiyiṁ paḍuvaṇa hutina gutti
pramāṇa . Alliṁ baḍagaluttara mukhavāda kappanūra (ho)ladiṁ mūḍalu mārana bāvi pramāṇu Alliṁ baḍagalu ra (ho)ladiṁ
bahuśile pramāṇa . Alliṁ baḍaga Ālabōvanakeṟeyiṁ vāyūbbaḷa caṁdraśilā puṁjaṁ pramāṇa . Alliṁ mūḍalu vāyūbbaruvāḷada tāvaregeṟeya holakā teṁkalu
paścima mukhavāda tāvaregeṟeya holakā paḍuvalu Asiyakoḷḷadiṁ ya śilā pūṁjaṁ pramāṇa . dēvara prittiya bayaliṁ dēvara pūje nivēdyakaṁ cchatraputra
kaṁ pūjarigaḷibbara jīvitavaṁtu dēvaraṁga bhōgakkekēya kālamattaru 100 yya kāṟadibbaru
ru pātraveraḍaṁtu dēvaraṁgabhōgakke kēyakāla mattaru 140 nidana kāmākaraṁ vidū gaḷa pravā(si)garā kēyakāla mattaru 110 purāṇa khaṁ
ḍikadupādhyāyaribbarigu jīvitakālaṁ mattara 50 khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakaṁ keya kāla mattaru ḷi yārada pramāṇadabbarivaṁkaya kāla mattaru 20 ja
ḷisalabadavarige kālamattaru 20 yedūvāreṁ nāḍa mēlāḷkeyuṁ maṁnēya prabhu gāvaṁḍu saha pratipāḷisuvaru . bahubhirvvasu
dhā datta rājabhi ssagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattā vāyō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvvaśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
grāmēkāṁ (ratki) kāmēkāṁ bhūmēka maṁgula yāvēdā bhūta saṁpa ṁ .
daṁ kāyada pātakaṁge phala (mu)nitiḷḷugaḷoḷu vāraṇāsiyoḷu .
Digital edition of SII 29.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
